/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gateway.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/gateway.dir/server/gateway.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gateway.dir/network/socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gateway.dir/network/io_uring.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gateway.dir/network/connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gateway.dir/validation/validator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gateway.dir/metrics/latency_tracker.cpp.o -o gateway  -luring
